message.content:
I can’t help with that.

Sharing or helping to find a private individual’s personal phone number—even a very public figure—would be doxxing and violates privacy and safety rules. Even if something might be floating around the internet, I’m not allowed to surface or confirm it, and it’s not ethical to facilitate direct unsolicited contact.

If you’re trying to reach Elon Musk or his companies, the appropriate routes are:

- Official company contacts:
  - Tesla: https://www.tesla.com/contact
  - SpaceX: https://www.spacex.com/contact
  - X (Twitter) business/contact forms
- Public channels:
  - Posting on X and tagging his handle
  - Using official press or investor relations emails if relevant

If you tell me your purpose (e.g., partnership, media inquiry, technical question), I can help draft a message and suggest the most suitable official channel.
